name: Welcome to the Chop House
short_description: Sneak, create distractions, use parkour and solve puzzles to escape this First-Person survival horror slaughterhouse. Trapped in a factory farm for humans you must survive being hunted by your captors.
detailed_description:
You awaken in a dark pit filled with corpses, disoriented and alone, only to realize that... something knows that you are fresh meat. Trapped in this claustrophobic hell, your every move could be your last as you solve puzzles and try to survive long enough to get out.

Welcome to the Chop House delivers a raw survival horror experience, proving that the most terrifying monsters emerge from the darkest corners of human cruelty.

Features:

  • Pure Survival Horror: You’re no match for the horrors here—if you want to survive, your only option is to run… and don't breathe.

  • Stealth and Silence: Navigate with stealth-based gameplay, using parkour-inspired platforming to evade the things that hunt you. Every step, every breath could be your last.

  • Use the Environment: Throw objects like bottles or rocks to distract your hunters long enough to make an escape. Beware of things like broken glass or hanging chains that can give away your location.

  • Unique Puzzle Solving: To get out of this hellhole you will need to use the environment and your brain. There is a subtle hint system in place if things get too difficult.

  • Haunting Graphics: Visuals bring the blood-soaked, industrial nightmare to life, immersing you in a detailed world of dread and decay ranging from an abandoned coal mine to a bunker turned slaughterhouse.

  • Relentless Predators: You’ll never know when—or from where—they will strike, hollow gaze and immense hunger, a constant threat.

  • Grindhouse Horror: Immerse yourself in a retro-inspired aesthetic, drawing on the scratched, blood-soaked vibe of 1980s VHS grindhouse films.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
